output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant coalesce, while refreshes for different tenants can run in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e5293edbffeNYKw5oAEIh0xR9","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1ad6c131001G12NezGzSzrckD"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex would unnecessarily serialize unrelated tenants; prior evidence cited auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel as requiring different tenants not to block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing retry queue rationale","Markdown parser onboarding cleanup"]}
